issues.detail: The instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage, focusing only on happy path scenarios.

scenarios.name: Cut GPT-4o chatbot bill by routing + caching FAQs
scenarios.rationale: Treatment combines CostTracker middleware (per-feature and per-user logging with PRICING table and cached-token pricing), routeModel sending extraction/classification/summarize to gpt-4o-mini, and SemanticCache with 0.92 similarity threshold + TTL — exactly the three-layer pattern in the skill; baseline suggests caching/cheaper models generically but does not separate cached vs uncached input pricing or use a 0.92 threshold.

scenarios.name: Enforce per-team monthly budgets with alerts
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses CostTracker.setBudget(feature, monthlyLimitUsd), getMonthlySpend filtering by month start, and triggers the warn at 80% threshold off the report() grouping by feature → model; baseline writes a generic spend tracker that doesn't match per-feature budget API or the report grouping shape.
